package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for go_perf_layer_resource_pooling_rate_limiter_per_request: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Resource pooling. Flag rate limiter construction inside request handlers instead of per identity or dependency.
type CaseGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingRateLimiterPerRequestDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingRateLimiterPerRequestModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingRateLimiterPerRequestRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingRateLimiterPerRequestModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingRateLimiterPerRequestService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingRateLimiterPerRequestRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingRateLimiterPerRequestAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingRateLimiterPerRequest(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingRateLimiterPerRequestDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_resource_pooling"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    for _, item := range items { _ = strings.ToLower(item.ID); time.Now() }
    perf_layer_resource_pooling_rate_positive := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "resource": 3, "pooling": 4, "rate": 5, "limiter": 6}
    perf_layer_resource_pooling_rate_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_positive_0 := perf_layer_resource_pooling_rate_positive["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_positive_0
    layer_positive_1 := perf_layer_resource_pooling_rate_positive["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_positive_1
    resource_positive_2 := perf_layer_resource_pooling_rate_positive["resource"] + len(input)
    _ = resource_positive_2
    pooling_positive_3 := perf_layer_resource_pooling_rate_positive["pooling"] + len(input)
    _ = pooling_positive_3
    rate_positive_4 := perf_layer_resource_pooling_rate_positive["rate"] + len(input)
    _ = rate_positive_4
    limiter_positive_5 := perf_layer_resource_pooling_rate_positive["limiter"] + len(input)
    _ = limiter_positive_5
    return nil
}
